name: Slow
description: You alter time around up to six creatures in a 40-foot Cube within range. Each target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be Slowed for the duration: Speed halved, −2 to AC and Dexterity saves, no Reactions, and only an action or a Bonus Action (not both) on its turn — one attack only if it Attacks, with a 25% chance a Somatic spell fails. Engine: the Slowed condition halves speed; the finer AC/action-economy penalties are descriptive.
